productDisplayName: John Players Men Stripes Grey Shirt
description: Style Note A well worn look with a gentle sheen, this dark charcoal grey buttoned down shirt comes from the Retrospectra collection from john players. When coupled with chinos and casual footwear, this casual shirt gives you the ideal weekend getaway look while taking care of your comfort with the soft and washed fabric. Product Details Dark charcoal grey shirt with white vertical stripes in front while the short sleeves and back remain plain, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, short sleeves and patch pockets on the left and right chest with rounded corners Material and Care Cotton linen blend Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low or dry in shade inside out Use warm iron Size and Fit John Players' trim fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
